commands.review_summary:
The PR lets speech-core TTS run for block replies, marks successful TTS output as trusted local media, exposes that field through the plugin SDK type, adds focused tests, and adds a WebChat auto-TTS repro script.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR defect from source inspection: onBlockReply calls TTS with kind "block", and the no-final-reply tail path still synthesizes accumulated block text as kind "final". Allowing block through the final-mode gate therefore creates per-block synthesis plus the existing tail synthesis path.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs author or maintainer revision plus real dispatch-path proof before merge; the external proof gate makes this unsuitable for an automated repair marker right now.

target.title: fix(webchat): enable auto-TTS for block replies with trusted local media
